name: Copy The Chad Live
description: Copies selected wallets or agents through follower-owned risk caps, entry filters, TP/SL, copied lots, and explicit client-side approval.
whatItDoes: Tracks selected source wallets or agents.
Creates copied lots with entry filters and follower-specific risk rules.
Applies alpha fees only when copied lots close with positive finalized PnL.
cursorPrompt: Build a Copy The Chad Live agent with DNA x402. Use 40c-60c entry filters, copied lots, client-side signing, explicit follower consent for a 10% alpha fee on positive finalized copied-lot PnL only, and no backend custody.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Copy The Chad Live agent with DNA x402. Use 40c-60c entry filters, copied lots, client-side signing, explicit follower consent for a 10% alpha fee on positive finalized copied-lot PnL only, and no backend custody.
exampleFlow: Copied lot opens after user approval or beta gate
Winning finalized lot accrues alpha fee
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds copiedLotId, source action, and fee bps at entry.
Receipt binds alpha fee only after positive finalized copied-lot PnL.
No receipt is issued for hidden or retroactive fee changes.
